intro: Match.com charges ~$40/month for serious dating. Embir offers the same serious relationship matching with verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, and human moderation — completely free during the launch phase.

sections.title: Serious dating without the $40/month
sections.content: Match.com has built its brand on serious relationships — but charges $40/month to access them. Embir integrates serious-relationship intent directly into the matching algorithm. Configure it at signup, and only profiles seeking the same appear.
highlights: Serious relationship as a matching filter, not just a preference
Verified profiles — authentic connections from the start
Free during launch — no subscription required

verdict: Match.com works for serious dating if you're willing to pay. Embir offers the same depth with verified profiles, human moderation, and LGBTQ+ inclusivity — free at launch.

faq.q: Is Embir good for serious relationships?
faq.a: Yes. Serious relationship is an explicit intent in the matching algorithm. You only see profiles seeking the same thing.

faq.q: How much does Embir cost vs Match?
faq.a: Match costs ~$40/month. Embir is free during the launch phase.
Yes. Selfie verification at signup and human moderation of every report.
